chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 229 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «غُسْلُ يَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ طَهُورٌ وَ كَفَّارَةٌ لِمَا بَيْنَهُمَا مِنَ اَلذُّنُوبِ مِنَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ إِلَى اَلْجُمُعَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.229 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
'The ghusl (ritual bath) of Jumu’ah is a purification and an expiation for the sins committed between one Jumu’ah and the next (Jumu’ah).'
